message:
feat(index): Add structured indexing stats to robot output (T7.4)

Enhance the run_index_with_data function to include detailed indexing
statistics in the JSON payload returned to robot/CLI callers. This enables
programmatic consumers to track indexing progress metrics without parsing
log output.

The stats are conditionally added to the response object when available,
preserving backwards compatibility for cases where stats aren't collected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
